overall.description: A first-person perspective journey through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, clearly from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The character moves from a covered neon-lit sidewalk onto wet city streets, passing futuristic buildings, glowing signage, and sparse traffic while rain creates reflective patterns on the asphalt.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

vertical structural pillars illuminated with bright red neon lights
circular neon sign for Tom's Diner visible across the rainy street
large industrial AC unit mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure illuminated by red neon lights. The wet concrete reflects the vibrant colors while Tom's Diner glows in the distance across the rainy street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with laundromat and neon signage

accelerates from walking to running speed while crossing the street

black car driving down the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: building with Brainwash signage and checkered pattern facade

tall street lamps illuminating the wet road surface

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway onto a rainy street corner. The character passes the Brainwash laundromat and navigates around pedestrians while vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt.

segments.scene_description: Running down the center of the wet city street past Tom's Diner and various neon-lit storefronts. Vehicles including a large red truck pass by while the rain creates reflective patterns on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street approaching underpass or tunnel

events.description: environment shifts from commercial to industrial architecture with fewer neon signs

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the street into a more industrial zone with fewer neon signs and more concrete structures. The road leads toward a dark underpass or tunnel entrance flanked by construction barriers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-drenched urban sidewalk into a stark, industrial city corridor. It begins beneath the red glow of an elevated highway, moving along a covered sidewalk where wet concrete reflects the vibrant lights and Tom's Diner glimmers in the distance. As the camera emerges from the walkway onto a rainy street corner, it navigates past the Brainwash laundromat and weaving pedestrians before accelerating down the center of the road. The scene then opens up as the character runs past glowing storefronts and a large red truck, with the rain creating shimmering reflective patterns across the asphalt. Finally, the vibrant neon colors fade as the path shifts toward a concrete industrial zone, leading the camera toward a dark underpass flanked by construction barriers.
